category_sources: source_facts.description says LiteCLI is a CLI for SQLite databases with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official dbcli/litecli repository; official project materials use the LiteCLI name.
docs_sources: Official dbcli/litecli README links to litecli.com as the project documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dbcli/litecli GitHub repository, and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SQLite CLI behavior and auto-completion/syntax highlighting; official LiteCLI docs cover database-client usage.
